testcase.name: verifyLoginPageNavigations

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //ul[@class='breadcrumb']//a[contains(@href,'common/home')]' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
